args:
set -eu
correct_dir=$(mktemp -d)
early_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$correct_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness >/dev/null
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$early_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness early-serve >/dev/null
python3 - "$correct_dir/materialization_report.json" "$early_dir/materialization_report.json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
correct = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
early = json.load(open(sys.argv[2]))
assert correct['readiness']['requested_readiness'] == 'correctness'
assert early['readiness']['requested_readiness'] == 'early_serve'
assert correct['readiness']['blocking_warmups_complete'] is True
assert early['readiness']['achieved_readiness'] == 'early_serve'
PY
printf 'explore-readiness-frontier\n'
